Package org.eventb.internal.core.pog

Class EventWitnessTable

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.core.tool.state.State
org.eventb.internal.core.pog.EventWitnessTable
All Implemented Interfaces:
IEventWitnessTable, IPOGState, IState
public class EventWitnessTable extends State implements IEventWitnessTable

    • getPrimeSubstitution

      public BecomesEqualTo getPrimeSubstitution()
      Description copied from interface: IEventWitnessTable
      Returns a substitution that renames machine variables witnessed non-deterministically into primed variables.
      Specified by:
      getPrimeSubstitution in interface IEventWitnessTable
      Returns:
      a substitution that renames machine variables witnessed non-deterministically into primed variables

    • getWitnesses

      public List<ISCWitness> getWitnesses()
      Description copied from interface: IEventWitnessTable
      Returns the array of witnesses. The indices of the returned array correspond to those returned by getVariables() and getPredicates().
      Specified by:
      getWitnesses in interface IEventWitnessTable
      Returns:
      the array of witnesses
      See Also:
      • IEventWitnessTable.getVariables()
      • IEventWitnessTable.getPredicates()

    • getMachineDetWitnesses

      public List<ISCWitness> getMachineDetWitnesses()
      Description copied from interface: IEventWitnessTable
      Returns the array of deterministic witnesses for machine variables. The indices of the returned array correspond to those returned by getMachineDetAssignments() and getMachinePrimedDetAssignments().
      Specified by:
      getMachineDetWitnesses in interface IEventWitnessTable
      Returns:
      the array of deterministic witnesses
      See Also:
      • IEventWitnessTable.getMachineDetAssignments()
      • IEventWitnessTable.getMachinePrimedDetAssignments()

    • getMachineDetAssignments

      public List<BecomesEqualTo> getMachineDetAssignments()
      Description copied from interface: IEventWitnessTable
      Returns the array of parsed and type-checked assignments corresponding to the deterministic witnesses for machine variables.

      The indices of this list correspond to the indices of the list of witnesses returned by getMachineDetWitnesses().

      Specified by:
      getMachineDetAssignments in interface IEventWitnessTable
      Returns:
      the array of parsed and type-checked assignments corresponding to the deterministic witnesses for machine variables
      See Also:
      • IEventWitnessTable.getMachineDetWitnesses()

    • getMachinePrimedDetAssignments

      public List<BecomesEqualTo> getMachinePrimedDetAssignments()
      Description copied from interface: IEventWitnessTable
      Returns the array of parsed and type-checked assignments to primed variables corresponding to the deterministic witnesses for machine variables. The returned assignment can only by used as a logical substitution. It is not a well-formed assignment in the mathematical notation of Event-B.

      The indices of this list correspond to the indices of the list of witnesses returned by getMachineDetWitnesses().

      Specified by:
      getMachinePrimedDetAssignments in interface IEventWitnessTable
      Returns:
      the array of parsed and type-checked assignments to primed variables corresponding to the deterministic witnesses for machine variables
      See Also:
      • IEventWitnessTable.getMachineDetWitnesses()

    • getEventDetWitnesses

      public List<ISCWitness> getEventDetWitnesses()
      Description copied from interface: IEventWitnessTable
      Returns the array of deterministic witnesses for event variables. The indices of the returned array correspond to those returned by getEventDetAssignments().
      Specified by:
      getEventDetWitnesses in interface IEventWitnessTable
      Returns:
      the array of deterministic witnesses for event variables
      See Also:
      • IEventWitnessTable.getEventDetAssignments()

    • getEventDetAssignments

      public List<BecomesEqualTo> getEventDetAssignments()
      Description copied from interface: IEventWitnessTable
      Returns the array of parsed and type-checked assignments corresponding to the deterministic witnesses for event variables.

      The indices of this list correspond to the indices of the list of witnesses returned by getEventDetWitnesses().

      Specified by:
      getEventDetAssignments in interface IEventWitnessTable
      Returns:
      the array of parsed and type-checked assignments corresponding to the deterministic witnesses for event variables
      See Also:
      • IEventWitnessTable.getEventDetWitnesses()

    • getNondetPredicates

      public List<Predicate> getNondetPredicates()
      Description copied from interface: IEventWitnessTable
      Returns the array of parsed and type-checked predicates corresponding to the non-deterministic witnesses for event and machine variables.

      The indices of this list correspond to the indices of the list of witnesses returned by getNondetWitnesses().

      Specified by:
      getNondetPredicates in interface IEventWitnessTable
      Returns:
      the array of parsed and type-checked predicates corresponding to the non-deterministic witnesses for event and machine variables
      See Also:
      • IEventWitnessTable.getNondetWitnesses()

    • getVariables

      public List<FreeIdentifier> getVariables()
      Description copied from interface: IEventWitnessTable
      Returns the array of witnessed variables. Machine variable witnesses are primed.

      The indices of this list correspond to the indices of the list of witnesses returned by getWitnesses().

      Specified by:
      getVariables in interface IEventWitnessTable
      Returns:
      array of witnessed variables
      See Also:
      • IEventWitnessTable.getWitnesses()

    • getNondetWitnesses

      public List<ISCWitness> getNondetWitnesses()
      Description copied from interface: IEventWitnessTable
      Returns the array of non-deterministic witnesses for event and machine variables. The indices of the returned array correspond to those returned by getNondetPredicates().
      Specified by:
      getNondetWitnesses in interface IEventWitnessTable
      Returns:
      the array of non-deterministic witnesses for event and machine variables
      See Also:
      • IEventWitnessTable.getNondetPredicates()

    • getNondetVariables

      public List<FreeIdentifier> getNondetVariables()
      Description copied from interface: IEventWitnessTable
      Returns the array of type-checked identifiers corresponding to the non-deterministic witnesses for event and machine variables. Machine variable witnesses have a prime attached, event variables not.

      The indices of this list correspond to the indices of the list of witnesses returned by getNondetWitnesses().

      Specified by:
      getNondetVariables in interface IEventWitnessTable
      Returns:
      the array of parsed and type-checked predicates corresponding to the non-deterministic witnesses for event and machine variables
      See Also:
      • IEventWitnessTable.getNondetWitnesses()

    • getPredicates

      public List<Predicate> getPredicates()
      Description copied from interface: IEventWitnessTable
      Returns the array of parsed and type-checked predicates corresponding to the witnesses for event and machine variables.

      The indices of this list correspond to the indices of the list of witnesses returned by getWitnesses().

      Specified by:
      getPredicates in interface IEventWitnessTable
      Returns:
      the array of parsed and type-checked predicates corresponding to the witnesses for event and machine variables
      See Also:
      • IEventWitnessTable.getWitnesses()

    • isDeterministic

      public boolean isDeterministic(int index)
      Description copied from interface: IEventWitnessTable
      Returns whether the witness at the specified index is deterministic.

      The indices correspond to the indices of the list of witnesses returned by getWitnesses().

      Specified by:
      isDeterministic in interface IEventWitnessTable
      Returns:
      whether the witness at the specified index is deterministic
      See Also:
      • IEventWitnessTable.getWitnesses()
